languages.text: Машина Нунциуса. Внутри — мертвый техножрец, наполовину превратившийся в металл.

traits.locale_text: Машина Нунциуса. Внутри — мертвый техножрец, наполовину превратившийся в металл.

languages.text: Великая машина больше не дышит. Кабели и трубы тянутся к саркофагу стазис-сацеллума, будто скорбя над одиноким телом Нунциуса в его последнем пристанище.
The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.
languages.original_text: Великая машина больше не дышит. Кабели и трубы тянутся к саркофагу стазис-сацеллума, будто скорбя над одиноким телом Нунциуса в его последнем пристанище.

traits.locale_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits sprawl toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.
The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits sprawl toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.
The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.
The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

languages.text: Die mächtige Maschine ist verstummt. Ihre Kabel und Leitungen schlängeln sich in Richtung des Stascen-Sacellum-Sarcophagus, als würde sie Nuncius und seine letzte Ruhestätte betrauern.
languages.original_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

traits.locale_text: Die mächtige Maschine ist verstummt. Ihre Kabel und Leitungen schlängeln sich in Richtung des Stascen-Sacellum-Sarcophagus, als würde sie Nuncius und seine letzte Ruhestätte betrauern.

languages.text: L'immense machine s'est tue. Ses câbles et conduits serpentent vers le sacellum de stase qui fait office de sarcophage et entourent le corps solitaire de Nuncius, comme pour le veiller.
languages.original_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

traits.locale_text: L'immense machine s'est tue. Ses câbles et conduits serpentent vers le sacellum de stase qui fait office de sarcophage et entourent le corps solitaire de Nuncius, comme pour le veiller.

languages.text: La gran máquina se ha quedado en silencio. Sus cables y conductos se extienden hacia el sarcófago de sacelio de suspensión como si cuidaran del cuerpo solitario de Nuncius en su última morada.
languages.original_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

traits.locale_text: La gran máquina se ha quedado en silencio. Sus cables y conductos se extienden hacia el sarcófago de sacelio de suspensión como si cuidaran del cuerpo solitario de Nuncius en su última morada.

languages.text: Büyük makine sessizliğe gömülmüş. Kabloları ve kanalları, Nuncius'un son istirahatgâhındaki yalnız bedeninin yasını tutuyormuşçasına staz şapeli lahdine doğru kıvrılıyor.
languages.original_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

traits.locale_text: Büyük makine sessizliğe gömülmüş. Kabloları ve kanalları, Nuncius'un son istirahatgâhındaki yalnız bedeninin yasını tutuyormuşçasına staz şapeli lahdine doğru kıvrılıyor.

languages.text: 那台宏伟的机器已陷入沉寂。它的线缆与管道蜿蜒探向静滞神龛的石棺，仿佛在为努恩修斯那具孤独长眠的躯体默哀。
languages.original_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

traits.locale_text: 那台宏伟的机器已陷入沉寂。它的线缆与管道蜿蜒探向静滞神龛的石棺，仿佛在为努恩修斯那具孤独长眠的躯体默哀。

languages.text: 巨大な機械は静まり返った。ケーブルや管が、ヌンシウスの遺体を納めた静止の聖域へと蛇のように伸びていく。
languages.original_text: The great machine has fallen silent. Its cables and conduits snake toward the stasis sacellum sarcophagus as if mourning over Nuncius's solitary body in its final resting place.

traits.locale_text: 巨大な機械は静まり返った。ケーブルや管が、ヌンシウスの遺体を納めた静止の聖域へと蛇のように伸びていく。
